title: Fix RootNodeInfo object graph
author: sparerd
body_snippet:
The object graph for ConnectionInfo-style objects is hard to work with due to everything inheriting from AbstractConnectionInfoData.

RootNodeInfo objects do not need any of the properties from AbstractConnectionInfoData, only the methods from ContainerInfo (which inherits from ConnectionInfo).

Because of this oversimplification, differentiating between RootNodeInfos and ConnectionInfos is a bit convoluted.

To fix this, we will need to break up the object graph around the ContainerInfo by crea...

iterations.description: Issue has no description, no reproducible steps, and last triage comment asked reporter to retest on latest build and provide steps - no response yet

comments.author: sparerd
comments.snippet:
Proposed object diagram (UML):

![2016-11-10_1213](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/6999446/20190531/1a3ede5e-a73f-11e6-8540-02ed11a02632.png)

**Legend:**
- Light red = new interface/class
- Orange = class requires explicit changes
- Purple = there will be implicit changes due to inheritance, though no explicit changes required
- Blue = no implicit or explicit changes

comments.author: sparerd
comments.snippet:
**Purpose of proposed changes:**
Remove `RootNodeInfo` from the `ConnectionInfo` object graph.

**Considerations:**
- We do not want to re-implement the `ContainerInfo` code, so we want to have a base implementation that both `ContainerInfo` and `RootNodeInfo` can use. Thus, `ContainerInfo` should implement `ITreeNodeContainer` and delegate its implementation to a `TreeNodeContainerBase` through composition.
- We will want a type to encapsulate the `ConnectionInfo`, `ContainerInfo`, and `RootNod...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.
